notableEvents.label: Connor Wong GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Connor Wong grounds into a double play, second baseman Gleyber Torres to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Wilyer Abreu scores. Ceddanne Rafaela to 3rd. Caleb Durbin out at 2nd. Connor Wong out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Connor Wong rally-killer GIDP

notableEvents.label: Dillon Dingler pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dillon Dingler flies out to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela.

notableEvents.label: Dillon Dingler pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dillon Dingler flies out sharply to right fielder Wilyer Abreu.
